name: Time
tagline: Bend the flow of time around yourself and others.

baseAbility.name: Alter Time
baseAbility.description: Standard action, touch, 0 SP. Apply a (chronos) effect to a target; you start with Haste (extra attack on a full attack, +1 to attacks/AC/Reflex, +30 ft. speed) and Slow (staggered, limited to one action per turn, Will negates). Lasts while you concentrate, or 1 SP for 1 round/CL without concentration.

talents.name: Improved Haste (chronos)
talents.description: Haste grants an extra attack of opportunity per 5 CL instead of (or alongside) the extra attack option.

talents.name: Improved Slow (chronos)
talents.description: Slow also staggers the target and suppresses its fast healing/regeneration for the duration.

talents.name: Time Bubble (chronos)
talents.description: New chronos ability: create an area where time flows differently, optionally applying Haste or Slow to everyone inside.

talents.name: Delay (chronos)
talents.description: As an immediate action, delay an incoming effect or damage against an ally until later in the round.

talents.name: Instill Alter Time
talents.description: Bottle an alter time effect into a liquid usable later like a potion.

talents.name: Foresight (chronos)
talents.description: New chronos ability: grant a target the chance to reroll a failed save or attack roll once per use.

talents.name: Ranged Time
talents.description: Alter Time works at close range instead of requiring touch. Repeatable to extend range further.

talents.name: Time Clone (advanced)
talents.description: Advanced ability: create a temporary duplicate of a creature drawn from a recent moment in time.

talents.name: Personal Focus
talents.description: Alter time effects targeting only yourself are more potent or cost less.

talents.name: Chrono-Vitality
talents.description: Haste can grant fast healing; Slow can suppress an enemy's fast healing or regeneration.
